reference: Hello Doctor, my name is Bala from India. I am twenty-six years old. I feel a little pressure in my heart. I do not feel any pain, and I do not have any problems with breathing. I have been feeling this for the last two months. Please tell me if this is a serious problem to worry about. In the last two months, there have been some days when I felt good as well.
text: Hello doctor, my name is Bala from India, and twenty six years old. I feel a little pressure in my heart. I do not feel any pain, and I do not have any problems of breathing. I have been feeling this for the last two months. Please tell me if this is a serious problem to worry about. In the last two months, there have been some days when I felt good as well.
